tests.description: ATDD backend acceptance tests for Story 3.3 all-case invocation, enriched prompt content, and schema-failure invocation handling (RED PHASE)
acceptance_criteria_covered: Invocation path runs for every cold-path case regardless of environment, criticality tier, or sustained flag
Prompt includes complete finding semantics plus topology/routing context
Prompt includes confidence calibration guidance, fault-domain hints, and deterministic few-shot guidance
Cold-path processing boundary is wired to invoke diagnosis after context retrieval and evidence summary generation

summary: Generated 5 failing backend ATDD tests for Story 3.3
